final:
module fractional_n_pll (  
    input clk,  
    input [3:0] freq_in,  
    output reg [3:0] freq_out  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        freq_out <= (freq_in * 3) >> 1; // Multiply by 1.5  
    end  
endmodule
